name: Subscribe & Punch!
short_description: Subscribe & Punch! is an easy to play versus fighting game based on the wacky YouTubers universe. Roast the face of your opponents and experiment various humorous interactions inside with YouFight: the virtual platform hosting the craziest fights!
detailed_description:
This is a demo version of Subscribe & Punch, including 2 characters.

Subscribe & Punch! is an easy to play versus fighting game based on the wacky YouTubers universe. Roast the face of your opponents and experiment various humorous interactions inside with YouFight: the virtual platform hosting the craziest fights!

FEATURES


  • Discover a stylized and colorful cartoon universe based on the top gaming YouTubers!
  • Play as Poodiepie (Pewdiepie) and ToastyKen (Cinnamontoastken) and fight with fast and easy chainable combos!
  • Experiment various mini-games & humorous interactions inside with YouFight, a fancy parody of YouTube hosting the craziest fights!
